title: Aoxun 8x4ft Metal Garden Shed Pent Roof, Bike Sheds and Outdoor Storage 234×131×185 cm, Weatherproof Garden Storage Shed with Triple Lockable Door for Garden, Patio, Courtyard, Backyard, Black
features: 𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 - The garden storage shed has a total of three doors in the front and back, providing great convenience for accessing items, especially large items such as bicycles, which can be accessed from the side doors. In addition, there are locks to ensure the safety of the tool room

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐒𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐠𝐞 - The garden shed, measuring 7.7’ L X 4.3’ W x 6.1’ H (234×131×185 cm) in size, offers versatile outdoor storage to accommodate various items or tools such as snow blowers, shovels, outdoor chairs, bicycles, and toy cars, thereby promoting a well-organized and tidy yard

𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 - The construction of sheds and outdoor storage utilizes high-quality materials, such as galvanized steel, to effectively safeguard against rust formation. Moreover, the implementation of color coated panels with powder coating ensures prolonged durability in adverse weather conditions. Furthermore, the incorporation of a stable base and robust structural design enhances stability and safety levels

𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐥𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐑𝐨𝐨𝐟 - Elegant and sophisticated black design makes the garden storage more durable. In addition, the metal tool house is designed with a sloping roof that allows it to drain quickly on rainy days to prevent rainwater from accumulating

𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 - The instructions for shed assembly are illustrated and accompanied by step-by-step guidance, ensuring ease of use. Additionally, all the necessary parts and hardware are clearly numbered for quick identification
